subject: [COMMON] Fix secretFast genericKV issue
commit_message:
[COMMON] Fix secretFast genericKV issue

buildCache was failing during rendering of a genericKV secret

Issue-ID: OOM-2761
Change-Id: Id381f90cd6c620a4a4390bc194f5db167efdcd3d
Signed-off-by: Jozsef Csongvai <jozsef.csongvai@bell.ca>

The Commit title must follow this pattern "[WHAT] A title"

WHAT can be a component name (AAI for example), DOC for documentation, COMMON for common, ...

The title must start with a capital letter (A in the example) and a space must be set between the end of the topic and the actual title: "] A title" ( https://jenkins.onap.org/job/oom-master-commit-lint/2342/ )
